name: agience-server-seraph
description: Guardian layer for the Agience platform: access control, audit trails, identity verification, policy compliance, and cryptographic artifact signing.

tools.name: audit_access
tools.description: Query the access audit log for a resource, collection, or user

tools.name: check_permissions
tools.description: Check what a person or API key can access

tools.name: grant_access
tools.description: Grant access to a collection for a person or team

tools.name: rotate_api_key
tools.description: Rotate a scoped API key and return the new key details

tools.name: verify_token
tools.description: Verify a JWT or API key and return its decoded claims

tools.name: list_audit_events
tools.description: List recent security events (logins, grants, revocations, key usage)

tools.name: sign_artifact
tools.description: Create a tamper-evident cryptographic signature artifact for an artifact

tools.name: enforce_policy
tools.description: Evaluate a request or artifact against active system policies

tools.name: check_compliance
tools.description: Check compliance of a resource or workflow against governance rules

AGIENCE_API_URI.description: Base URI of the agience-core backend

MCP_PORT.description: HTTP port for the MCP server
